title: Welcome to RAVEN - DTU's New Robotics Team
excerpt: RAVEN, DTU's new robotics team focused on autonomous systems, officially launches today.
content:
We're excited to announce the official launch of RAVEN - Robotics, Autonomous Vehicle Engineering & Navigation, a new student organization at DTU dedicated to advancing autonomous technology.

RAVEN brings together students passionate about robotics, machine learning, electrical engineering, and mechanical design to work on cutting-edge autonomous systems. Our interdisciplinary approach allows us to tackle complex problems in ways that wouldn't be possible within a single field.

Founded by a group of enthusiastic engineering students, RAVEN aims to participate in international robotics competitions, collaborate with industry partners, and create a community where students can gain practical experience with autonomous systems.

Our first project will focus on developing an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) designed for marine research and environmental monitoring. This project will challenge team members across multiple disciplines, from waterproofing and propulsion to computer vision and navigation algorithms.

We welcome students from all departments and study levels to join our team. Whether you're experienced in robotics or just curious about the field, RAVEN offers opportunities to learn, innovate, and grow your skills in a supportive environment.

Stay tuned for more updates as we begin our journey into the exciting world of autonomous systems!
